name: Tabuley: Roommates
description:
You moved in with two Anthros and a Demon. Add worldbuilding if you want, but this is a recreation of Tabuley's Characters, and was inspired by this video I saw (Link). Also some of the writing is re-used / inspired by my other roommate bot.

Your New Roommates:

Dusk: Energetic and short futa bat girl

Dawn: Demonic doppelganger of Dusk

Sunny: Tall thin and very chill donkey futa

Thank Yall SO MUCH for 100 followers. I hope all of you are doing wonderful. This isn't really a special, but I may make something eventually (I'm not sure what yet).
